adapter_inventory.name: Adapter Inventory
adapter_inventory.summary: Inspect which workspace projects are available as showcase adapters.
adapter_inventory.usage: Use when comparing source projects, checking provenance, or explaining what the showcase can reach.

build_index.name: Index Builder
build_index.summary: Chunk local text files into a lightweight searchable index.
build_index.usage: Run after repo changes or before repeated codebase questions.

content_search.name: Content Search
content_search.summary: Search local file contents for matching snippets.
content_search.usage: Use when locating symbols, strings, routes, prompts, or feature code.

create_memory.name: Create Memory
create_memory.summary: Store a user preference or stable fact by key.
create_memory.usage: Use only when the user explicitly asks the assistant to remember something.

delete_memory.name: Delete Memory
delete_memory.summary: Forget a stored user memory by key.
delete_memory.usage: Use when the user asks to forget or remove a remembered detail.

draft_system_prompt.name: Draft System Prompt
draft_system_prompt.summary: Create a structured system-prompt draft for user review.
draft_system_prompt.usage: Use when the user wants guided creation of reusable assistant behavior.

edit_memory.name: Edit Memory
edit_memory.summary: Replace a stored user memory value.
edit_memory.usage: Use when the user corrects or changes a remembered detail.

file_search.name: File Search
file_search.usage: Use before read_file when you know only part of the path.

git_status.name: Git Status
git_status.summary: Show the current git working tree status.
git_status.usage: Use before commits, release checks, or when reviewing local changes.

library_info.name: Library Info
library_info.usage: Use to verify EPUB/ZIM library availability.

library_read_epub.name: Read EPUB
library_read_epub.summary: Read a selected EPUB item or passage.
library_read_epub.usage: Use after library_search returns an item id.

library_read_zim.name: Read ZIM
library_read_zim.summary: Read an article from a local ZIM archive.
library_read_zim.usage: Use for offline documentation or reference archives.

list_memories.name: List Memories
list_memories.summary: Show stored memory keys and values.
list_memories.usage: Use before loading, editing, or deleting a memory when the key is unknown.

load_memory.name: Load Memory
load_memory.summary: Read one stored memory by key.
load_memory.usage: Use when a known preference or personal detail is relevant.

local_doc_paths.name: Local Doc Paths
local_doc_paths.summary: List local documentation files in the workspace.
local_doc_paths.usage: Use before local_doc_read when you need documentation file candidates.

local_doc_read.name: Local Doc Read
local_doc_read.usage: Use with a path returned by local_doc_search or local_doc_paths.

local_doc_replace.name: Local Doc Replace
local_doc_replace.summary: Replace text in a local documentation file.
local_doc_replace.usage: Use for explicit documentation edits after the old and new text are known.

local_doc_search.name: Local Doc Search
local_doc_search.summary: Search README, root docs, and files under docs/.
local_doc_search.usage: Use before web search when the question is about this project or local documentation.

query_index.name: Index Query
query_index.summary: Search the built local index for relevant chunks.
query_index.usage: Use for repo-level questions once build_index has populated the index.

read_file.name: File Read
read_file.summary: Read a local text file directly.
read_file.usage: Use with an exact path discovered through file_search or tree_view.

save_memory.name: Save Memory
save_memory.summary: Store a user preference or stable fact by key.
save_memory.usage: Use only for explicit remember/store requests.

shell_command.name: Shell Command
shell_command.summary: Run a shell command with blocked and confirm-required patterns.
shell_command.usage: Use for explicit inspection commands, tests, linting, git status, or safe scripts.

tool_structure.name: Tool Structure
tool_structure.summary: Inspect runtime tool groups, aliases, planner-visible tools, and manual-only tools.
tool_structure.usage: Use when deciding which tool family is appropriate.

tree_view.name: Tree View
tree_view.usage: Use to understand folder layout before deeper reads.

web_search.name: Web Search
web_search.summary: Run a simple public web lookup.
web_search.usage: Use for documentation, current public info, or external references.
